channel.title: Sports Analytics Opportunities
channel.description: Calls for papers, abstracts, posters, presentations, hackathons, research competitions, and sports data challenges.

item.title: MathSport Asia 2026 abstract submission
item.description: Submit an English abstract of up to 500 words with three to five keywords. Status: open Deadline: 2026-08-03T23:59:59+05:30 Event: 2026-12-08T00:00:00+05:30 through 2026-12-10T23:59:59+05:30 Eligibility: open

item.title: CASSIS 2026 registration
item.description: Registration is open for the September 12 symposium in Vancouver. Status: open Event: 2026-09-12T00:00:00-07:00

item.title: MathSport Asia 2026 early registration
item.description: Early registration deadline for MathSport Asia 2026. Status: open Deadline: 2026-09-30T23:59:59+05:30 Event: 2026-12-08T00:00:00+05:30 through 2026-12-10T23:59:59+05:30

item.title: SSAC27 Research Paper Competition abstract submission
item.description: Abstracts must report completed results and include an open-source repository link. Status: open Deadline: 2026-10-01T23:59:00-04:00 Event: 2027-02-25T00:00:00-05:00 through 2027-02-26T23:59:59-05:00 Eligibility: open

item.title: MathSport Asia 2026 final registration
item.description: Final registration deadline at the higher fee. Status: open Deadline: 2026-11-02T23:59:59+05:30 Event: 2026-12-08T00:00:00+05:30 through 2026-12-10T23:59:59+05:30

item.title: SSAC27 invited full paper submission
item.description: Full manuscripts are accepted only from authors selected after abstract review. Status: invitation_only Deadline: 2026-12-04T23:59:00-05:00 Event: 2027-02-25T00:00:00-05:00 through 2027-02-26T23:59:59-05:00 Eligibility: invitation_only

item.title: MathSport Asia complete paper submission
item.description: Optional complete papers may be submitted for proceedings after abstract acceptance. Status: invitation_only Deadline: 2027-02-28T23:59:59+05:30 Eligibility: accepted_abstracts

item.title: MLSA 2026 workshop
item.description: Full-day workshop co-located with ECML PKDD 2026 in Naples. Status: upcoming Event: 2026-09-07T00:00:00+02:00

item.title: Hudl Performance Insights 2026 finalist presentations
item.description: Selected research finalists present at Emirates Stadium in London. Status: upcoming Event: 2026-11-13T00:00:00+00:00 Eligibility: selected_finalists

item.title: CMSAC research competition and poster calls
item.description: Monitor the official conference site for the next research competition, poster, and registration dates. Status: monitor

item.title: CSAS/UCSAS data challenge, poster, and workshop calls
item.description: The 2026 symposium is complete; monitor for the next student data challenge, posters, and workshops. Status: monitor

item.title: Kaggle sports competition index
item.description: Authenticated polling adds active sports-related Kaggle competitions to this feed automatically. Status: monitor

item.title: MathSport International 2027 conference call
item.description: The next European MathSport meeting is planned for 2027; exact dates and location are not yet posted. Status: monitor

item.title: MIT Sloan hackathon and competition calls
item.description: Monitor for the next hackathon, startup competition, and case competition application windows. Status: monitor

item.title: NESSIS 2027 abstract submissions
item.description: The official call says abstract submissions will open in early 2027; no exact deadline is posted yet. Status: monitor

item.title: NFL Big Data Bowl next competition
item.description: The NFL says calls typically open in the fall and run into early January; monitor for the next Kaggle launch. Status: monitor

item.title: MLSA 2026 paper submission
item.description: Paper submission for the ECML PKDD sports analytics workshop. Status: closed Deadline: 2026-06-05T23:59:59+02:00 Event: 2026-09-07T00:00:00+02:00

item.title: Hudl Performance Insights 2026 research proposals
item.description: Selected researchers receive Hudl data and present completed work at Emirates Stadium. Status: closed Deadline: 2026-07-03T23:59:59+01:00 Event: 2026-11-13T00:00:00+00:00 Eligibility: open

item.title: CASSIS 2026 abstract submissions
item.description: The official page states that abstract submissions have closed. Status: closed Event: 2026-09-12T00:00:00-07:00
